name: Maurice Ravel
abstract: Joseph Maurice Ravel (7 March 1875 – 28 December 1937) was a French composer, pianist and conductor. He is often associated with Impressionism along with his elder contemporary Claude Debussy, although both composers rejected the term.

about_quotes.speaker: Louie Bellson
about_quotes.evidence: I was interested in composing classical music... My first assignment with Buddy Baker – he gave me the full score of Daphnis and Chloé by Maurice Ravel... Is this going back to your early influences with Ravel, Daphnis and Chloé? Yeah.
about_quotes.doc_title: Louie Bellson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
